rules.description: Employment contract must define the employee's role and duties.
Employment contract must specify compensation and salary terms.
Employment contract must include termination provisions.
Employment contract should include a confidentiality obligation.
Employment contracts must specify notice period for termination as required by applicable labour law.
rules.statutory_reference: Industrial Employment (Standing Orders) Act 1946 – S.13; Industrial Disputes Act 1947 – S.25F

rules.description: Employment contracts should include leave policy in compliance with applicable Shops & Establishments Act.
rules.statutory_reference: Factories Act 1948 – S.78; Shops and Establishments Acts (State-specific)

rules.description: Employment contracts should specify working hours in compliance with applicable labour statutes.
rules.statutory_reference: Factories Act 1948 – S.51; Shops and Establishments Acts (State-specific)
